faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to your inquiries regarding the platform and our methodology

items.question: What is the nature of the content provided by the platform?
items.answer: The platform provides specialized analytical content in political and strategic affairs, focused on geopolitical interpretation, media discourse analysis, and the development of deep explanatory frameworks that go beyond surface-level event narration.

items.question: Does the content reflect a specific political orientation?
items.answer: The content follows a sovereign analytical approach grounded in a structural understanding of the state and society, aiming to interpret developments within strategic frameworks rather than through simplification or propaganda.

items.question: How is the accuracy of the analysis ensured?
items.answer: Content is built through layered conceptual and analytical methodologies, including mechanism-based analysis, contextual reading, and the integration of political and social variables into coherent explanatory models.

items.question: Does the platform use artificial intelligence?
items.answer: Yes. Artificial intelligence is used as a support layer for analysis, structuring, and efficiency enhancement, while intellectual and editorial oversight remains under qualified human review.

items.question: Can the content be used for research purposes?
items.answer: The content may be used as an analytical reference with proper attribution, given that it is developed according to standards aligned with international think tanks and research institutions.

items.question: How is user data handled?
items.answer: User data is managed under strict protection measures including encryption, access minimization, and no sharing beyond approved legal and regulatory frameworks.
